description: Lock corrected chronology and removed false bronze dependencies for foundational ancient metallurgy nodes audited on 2026-06-15.

checks.reason: Early forging/smithing should not require later copper-tin bronze alloying.
Native-copper pins/hooks/awls predate bronze casting molds.
Cart axle bearings can be wood/leather friction surfaces and should not require later bronze molds.
Broad portable balances should not require cast bronze molds.
Bronze Working is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 ancient metallurgy audit.
Tin Working is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 ancient metallurgy audit.
Bronze Casting Molds is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 ancient metallurgy audit.
Copper-Alloy Edge Tools is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 ancient metallurgy audit.
Forging and Smithing is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 ancient metallurgy audit.
Copper Pins, Hooks & Fasteners is source-anchored during the 2026-06-15 ancient metallurgy audit.
